name: Temper
description: Temper MCP integration — governed REPL tools (temper_execute for all operations, temper_search for discovery) and real-time entity subscriptions via SSE

url.description: Temper server URL (used for SSE events)

temperBinary.description: Path to temper binary (default: 'temper' on PATH)

port.description: Port where Temper HTTP server is running (passed as --port to temper mcp)

agentId.description: Agent identity for Cedar authorization and trajectory logging (passed as --agent-id)

agent.description: Agent ID to route events to

subscribe.description: Entity types to subscribe to via SSE

specsDir.description: Path to specs directory (used by temper serve --app, not by MCP thin client)
